title: Fraud Examiners, Investigators and Analysts
description: Obtain evidence, take statements, produce reports, and testify to findings regarding resolution of fraud allegations. May coordinate fraud detection and prevention activities.

tasks.text: Gather financial documents related to investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview witnesses or suspects and take statements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare written reports of investigation findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document all investigative activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create and maintain logs, records, or databases of information about fraudulent activity.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Coordinate investigative efforts with law enforcement officers and attorneys.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lead, or participate in, fraud investigation teams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Testify in court regarding investigation findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare evidence for presentation in court.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend actions in fraud cases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review reports of suspected fraud to determine need for further investigation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design, implement, or maintain fraud detection tools or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze financial data to detect irregularities in areas such as billing trends, financial relationships, and regulatory compliance procedures.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of current events and trends in such areas as money laundering and criminal tools and techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate business operations to identify risk areas for fraud.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct in-depth investigations of suspicious financial activity, such as suspected money-laundering efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise businesses or agencies on ways to improve fraud detection.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train others in fraud detection and prevention techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct field surveillance to gather case-related information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate with responsible parties to arrange for recovery of losses due to fraud.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research or evaluate new technologies for use in fraud detection systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Obtain and serve subpoenas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrest individuals to be charged with fraud.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
